phrases.intent_en: Ask where to pay for snacks
phrases.cultural_note: Transactions at transport hubs are handled at designated counters with direct pointing.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find FlixBus platform
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a plataforma do FlixBus?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh DOO FLEEKS-boosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese staff prioritize direct spatial references without extra pleasantries.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a plataforma do FlixBus.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh DOO FLEEKS-boosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the FlixBus platform.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the FlixBus platform.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh DOO FLEEKS-boosh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a plataforma do FlixBus.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso validar o meu cartão BTU?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo vuh-lee-DAHR AW MEHOO kuh-ruh-TOWN BTOO?

likely_response.local: Utilize as máquinas de validação BTU disponíveis no terminal. Valide o seu bilhete antes de embarcar.
likely_response.pronunciation: oo-tee-LEE-zih UHSH MAH-kee-nuhsh DIH vuh-lee-duh-SOWN BTOO deesh-poo-NEE-vaysh NOO tih-ruh-mee-NAHL. vuh-LEE-dih AW SEHOO bee-LYEH-tih AHNNG-tihsh DIH aym-buh-ruh-KAHR.
likely_response.translation_en: Use the BTU validation machines available at the terminal. Validate your ticket before boarding.

responses.english: Use the BTU validation machines available at the terminal. Validate your ticket before boarding.
responses.phonetic: oo-tee-LEE-zih UHSH MAH-kee-nuhsh DIH vuh-lee-duh-SOWN BTOO deesh-poo-NEE-vaysh NOO tih-ruh-mee-NAHL. vuh-LEE-dih AW SEHOO bee-LYEH-tih AHNNG-tihsh DIH aym-buh-ruh-KAHR.
responses.french: Utilize as máquinas de validação BTU disponíveis no terminal. Valide o seu bilhete antes de embarcar.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso validar o meu cartão BTU?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo vuh-lee-DAHR AW MEHOO kuh-ruh-TOWN BTOO?

likely_response.local: Dirija-se às máquinas de validação BTU na sala de espera principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH UHUHSH MAH-kee-nuhsh DIH vuh-lee-duh-SOWN BTOO NUH SAH-luh DIH SHPEH-ruh preen-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Go to the BTU validation machines in the main waiting room.

responses.english: Go to the BTU validation machines in the main waiting room.
responses.phonetic: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH UHUHSH MAH-kee-nuhsh DIH vuh-lee-duh-SOWN BTOO NUH SAH-luh DIH SHPEH-ruh preen-see-PAHL.
responses.french: Dirija-se às máquinas de validação BTU na sala de espera principal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find FlixBus platform
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a plataforma da FlixBus?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh DUH FLEEKS-boosh?
phrases.cultural_note: A plataforma três é compartilhada entre FlixBus e Rede Expressos.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to recharge BTU card
phrases.text_local: Onde posso recarregar o cartão BTU?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo reh-kuh-rih-GAHR AW kuh-ruh-TOWN BTOO?
phrases.cultural_note: A recarga do cartão BTU é feita presencialmente na bilheteira, não nas máquinas de validação.

likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the ticket office.

responses.english: Good morning, at the ticket office.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to pay for snacks
phrases.cultural_note: O pagamento de snacks é feito na caixa do quiosque de snacks.
